content.text: The system shall provide navigation access to the Rules and Action screen through the path MHE → IMDS → Rules and Action from the left-side menu.

104.title: Save Checklist and Associate with Selected Part

content.text: Upon successful validation, the system shall save the checklist configuration and associate it with the selected part.
the checklist configuration saved and linked to the selected part
the checklist is properly associated within the MHE configuration.
the system saves the checklist configuration and associates the checklist with the selected part.
Upon successful save system shall display a success toast – “Checklist saved successfully”
a success notification displayed after saving a checklist
I receive confirmation that the checklist was saved successfully.
the checklist configuration is saved successfully
the system displays a success toast message stating “Checklist saved successfully”.
The system shall display an “Edit Checklist” modal when the user selects the edit action for an existing checklist.
an Edit Checklist modal displayed when editing an existing checklist
I can update checklist details and configurations.
an existing checklist record is displayed
the user selects the edit action for the checklist
the system displays an “Edit Checklist” modal.
The system shall display the modal title as “Edit Checklist”.
the Edit Checklist modal title displayed
I can identify the purpose of the modal.
the Edit Checklist modal is displayed
the system displays the modal title as “Edit Checklist”.
The system shall prepopulate all checklist fields with the existing checklist data when the Edit Checklist modal is opened.
all checklist fields prepopulated with existing values
I can review and update the current checklist configuration.
the Edit Checklist modal is displayed
the system prepopulates all checklist fields with the existing checklist data.
The system shall allow the user to edit the Checklist Title field.
I can update the checklist name when required.
the Edit Checklist modal is displayed
the user modifies the Checklist Title field
the system allows the user to edit the Checklist Title field.
The system shall mark the Checklist Title field as mandatory using a visual indicator (*).
the Checklist Title field visually marked as mandatory
I can identify required fields easily.
the Edit Checklist modal is displayed
the Checklist Title field is rendered
the system marks the Checklist Title field as mandatory using a visual indicator (*).
The system shall allow the user to edit the Inspection Method selection from the dropdown field.
I can update the inspection process associated with the checklist.
the Edit Checklist modal is displayed
the user interacts with the Inspection Method dropdown
the system allows the user to edit the Inspection Method selection from the dropdown field.
The system shall mark the Inspection Method field as mandatory using a visual indicator (*).
the Inspection Method field visually marked as mandatory
I can easily identify required checklist fields.
the Edit Checklist modal is displayed

the system marks the Inspection Method field as mandatory using a visual indicator (*).
The system shall display the previously selected Inspection Method value when editing an existing checklist.

114.title: Display Evidence Submission Methods as Checkboxes

content.text: The system shall display Evidence Submission Method options as selectable checkboxes.
evidence submission methods displayed as selectable checkboxes
I can configure supported evidence types easily.
the Edit Checklist modal is displayed
the Evidence Submission Method section is rendered
the system displays Evidence Submission Method options as selectable checkboxes.
The system shall support evidence submission method options including Audio, Video, Image, and Note.
multiple evidence submission method options available
I can configure the required evidence types for inspections.
the Evidence Submission Method section is displayed
the system supports evidence submission method options including Audio, Video, Image, and Note.
The system shall display previously selected evidence submission methods in a preselected state during checklist editing.
previously selected evidence methods displayed in a preselected state
I can review the current checklist configuration during editing.
the Edit Checklist modal is opened for an existing checklist
the Evidence Submission Method section is rendered
the system displays previously selected evidence submission methods in a preselected state.
The system shall allow the user to modify evidence submission method selections.
I can update the checklist evidence requirements.
evidence submission method checkboxes are displayed
the user selects or deselects options
the system allows the user to modify evidence submission method selections.

118.title: Display Condition Definitions Section in Edit Mode

content.text: The system shall display a Condition Definitions section containing severity-based condition cards.
the Condition Definitions section displayed while editing a checklist
I can review and update severity-based conditions.
the Edit Checklist modal is displayed
the system displays a Condition Definitions section containing severity-based condition cards.
The system shall allow the user to edit all fields within the Red – Critical, Amber – Warning, and Green – Normal condition definition cards.
edit all fields within severity condition cards
I can update condition descriptions and required actions for each severity level.
the Condition Definitions section is displayed
the user edits condition card fields
the system allows editing of all fields within the Red – Critical, Amber – Warning, and Green – Normal condition definition cards.

120.title: Preserve Severity Styling in Edit Mode

content.text: The system shall preserve severity-specific styling and labels for all condition definition cards in edit mode.
severity-specific styling and labels preserved in edit mode
condition cards remain visually distinguishable and consistent.
the Edit Checklist modal is displayed
the Condition Definitions section is rendered
the system preserves severity-specific styling and labels for all condition definition cards in edit mode.

121.title: Support Vertical Scrolling in Edit Checklist Modal

content.text: The system shall provide vertical scrolling within the Edit Checklist modal when content exceeds the visible viewport height.
vertical scrolling within the Edit Checklist modal when content exceeds the viewport
I can access and review all checklist configuration fields.
the Edit Checklist modal content exceeds the visible viewport height
the system provides vertical scrolling within the Edit Checklist modal.

122.title: Display Cancel Button in Edit Checklist Modal

content.text: The system shall display a Cancel button within the Edit Checklist modal footer.
a Cancel button displayed in the Edit Checklist modal footer
I can discard changes and close the modal.
the Edit Checklist modal is displayed
the system displays a Cancel button within the Edit Checklist modal footer.

123.title: Close Edit Checklist Modal Without Saving

content.text: Upon clicking the Cancel button, the system shall close the Edit Checklist modal without saving modifications.
the Edit Checklist modal closed without saving modifications when clicking Cancel
I can safely discard unwanted changes.

the system closes the Edit Checklist modal without saving modifications.

125.title: Validate Mandatory Fields Before Updating Checklist

content.text: Upon clicking the Update Checklist button, the system shall validate all mandatory fields before saving changes.
mandatory checklist fields validated before updates are saved
invalid or incomplete checklist configurations are prevented.
the Edit Checklist modal is displayed

the system validates all mandatory fields before saving changes.
The system shall update the existing checklist details upon successful validation and submission.

The system shall prevent checklist updates if mandatory fields contain invalid or empty values.
the system to prevent checklist updates when mandatory fields are invalid or empty
incomplete or invalid checklist configurations are not saved.

the user attempts to update the checklist with invalid or empty mandatory fields
the system prevents checklist updates and requires valid field values before submission can proceed.

128.title: Display Close Icon in Edit Checklist Modal

content.text: The system shall display a close icon at the top-right corner of the Edit Checklist modal.
a close icon displayed at the top-right corner of the Edit Checklist modal

the system displays a close icon at the top-right corner of the Edit Checklist modal.
